description: The university recruiting team is managing the application and selection process for the summer internship program.

nodes.task_description: Create and post all internship requisitions.

expected_outcome.value: Team creates requisitions for all available intern roles.

nodes.task_description: Review applications and conduct interviews to select the final candidates.

expected_outcome.value: Team screens, interviews, and selects a cohort of summer interns.

nodes.task_description: Send offer letters to the selected interns and manage their onboarding process.

expected_outcome.value: Team successfully hires and onboards all interns for the program.
